Spring Data REST
  1. org.springframework.data.rest.core.event

Uses of Package
org.springframework.data.rest.core.event

Packages that use org.springframework.data.rest.core.event
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.rest.core.event
 
org.springframework.data.rest.webmvc.config
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.rest.core.event used by org.springframework.data.rest.core.event
    Class
    Description
    AbstractRepositoryEventListener
    Abstract class that listens for generic RepositoryEvents and dispatches them to a specific method based on the event type.
    LinkedEntityEvent
    Base class for RepositoryEvents that deal with saving/updating or deleting a linked object.
    RepositoryEvent
    Abstract base class for events emitted by the REST exporter.
    ValidatingRepositoryEventListener
    ApplicationListener implementation that dispatches RepositoryEvents to a specific Validator.
  • Classes in org.springframework.data.rest.core.event used by org.springframework.data.rest.webmvc.config
    Class
    Description
    AnnotatedEventHandlerInvoker
    Component to discover annotated repository event handlers and trigger them on ApplicationEvents.
    ValidatingRepositoryEventListener
    ApplicationListener implementation that dispatches RepositoryEvents to a specific Validator.
